prompt: In image 1, a visual instruction guide, modify step 2 by having the left hand wear the Infinity Gauntlet from image 2 while holding the hammer from image 3, ensuring the instructional arrows remain intact.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a visual instruction guide. In 'step 2', replace the existing left hand and forearm with a new left hand wearing the Infinity Gauntlet from image 2. This gauntlet-clad hand must be depicted holding the hammer from image 3. Ensure both the Infinity Gauntlet and the hammer are rendered in the same black-and-white line drawing style as the original instructional graphic in image 1. Preserve all instructional arrows in 'step 2' without alteration.
